---
title: "Introduction"
subtitle: "Part I, {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}"
---

## Learning outcomes

Students will be able to:

{{< include /_includes/learning-outcomes/_part-01_learning-outcomes.qmd >}}

## Select topics

-   Motivating examples
-   How is it being used?
-   Why is it happening?
    (Technological breakthroughs in how to learn from data; availability of massive amounts of data; the adaptation of GPU hardware to AI tasks; global connectivity; the existence of massive data centers; and the ability to compute in the cloud.)
